name: coinjoin
title: CoinJoin / Batch Signing over USB
description: Pre-approved remote signing over USB: SLIP-19 ownership proofs and policy-checked PSBT signing for WabiSabi coinjoin (and plain batched multi-wallet transactions). Host-proposed policy approved on the device, Trezor-style.
author: kravens

distribution.signing: PGP signature + SHA256 of released .mpy, verified on-device against SIGNER_PUBKEY
distribution.note: Ships as a build-time frozen extension until the kapps signed-apps framework merges; run(ctx) entry point is already kapp-compatible.
